hero.title: Learn smarter, not harder
hero.subtitle: AI-powered flashcards with scientifically optimized spaced repetition, Bloom's Taxonomy tracking, and a conversational AI tutor.

features.sectionSubtitle: LearnForge combines proven learning science with modern AI to help you truly understand — not just memorize.

fsrs.title: FSRS Algorithm
fsrs.description: Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler optimizes your review intervals based on your actual performance. Each card is scheduled individually — you review exactly when you need to.

bloom.title: Bloom's Taxonomy
bloom.description: Track your cognitive depth from Remember to Create. Cards progress through six levels as your understanding deepens, ensuring you don't just memorize but truly master concepts.

ai.title: AI Tutor
ai.description: Create rich, interactive flashcards through conversation with Claude. The AI tutor generates cards with formulas, diagrams, and multiple-choice questions — tailored to your learning goals.

screenshots.dashboardDesc: Track your progress with streaks, accuracy, and card state overview.
screenshots.studyDesc: Interactive cards with KaTeX formulas, MCQ, and spaced repetition ratings.
screenshots.cardsDesc: Browse, filter, and search your entire card collection by topic and Bloom level.

step1.title: Create
step1.description: Tell the AI tutor what you want to learn. It creates rich, interactive flashcards with formulas, diagrams, and quizzes.

step2.title: Study
step2.description: FSRS schedules your reviews at scientifically optimal intervals. You study what you need, when you need it.

step3.title: Master
step3.description: Bloom's Taxonomy tracks your understanding depth. Progress from basic recall to creative application.

katex.title: KaTeX Formulas
katex.description: Beautiful math rendering for STEM subjects

svg.title: SVG Diagrams
svg.description: Visual learning with custom diagrams and charts

search.title: Semantic Search
search.description: Find related cards by meaning, not just keywords

darkTheme.title: Dark Theme
darkTheme.description: Easy on the eyes for late-night study sessions

earlyAccess.title: Want to try LearnForge?
earlyAccess.description: LearnForge is in early development. If you're interested in trying it out, send me an email and I'll set up a testing account for you.
earlyAccess.note: Free during early access. No credit card required.
